Usage: pnpm create <name>
       pnpm create <name-without-create>
       pnpm create <@scope>

Creates a project from a `create-*` starter kit.

Options:
      --allow-build        A list of package names that are allowed to run
                           postinstall scripts during installation

Visit https://pnpm.io/10.x/cli/create for documentation about this command.
